summary: A nice hidden‑gem show featuring a jazzy “Eyes of the World” and a solid “Lust Alittle”, with decent but unspecified recording quality.
review: The reviewer praises this 1990 performance as a hidden gem, highlighting the smoky vibe of the year and noting that “Eyes of the World” carries a jazzy ’90 feel. No concrete details on the audio source are given, but the overall tone is positive toward both the music and its listenability.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) that focuses on the musical performance; recording quality isn’t discussed, so rating leans on show quality with modest confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound clarity or mix issues; implied that it is listenable enough to be called a hidden gem.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer notes the band was “smokin” throughout, suggesting an energetic and cohesive set.
